positive: A stylized, cosmic flora pattern featuring bioluminescent, abstract mushrooms and floating geometric crystalline structures within a deep indigo nebula background. The composition must be symmetrical and central, designed as a seamless repeating pattern suitable for apparel. Use a high-contrast color palette of electric cyan, luminous violet, deep black, and iridescent gold accents. The style should be a blend of neo-Art Nouveau and vaporwave psychedelia, rendered with sharp vector precision and defined, clean silhouettes. Minimalist yet complex, focusing on flowing curves and strong cosmic symmetry. Studio lighting effect, macro photography feel, high detail.
